name: SanDisk Ultra UHS-I SDXC Memory Card
description: The Ultra UHS-I SDXC Memory Card from SanDisk features a storage capacity of 64GB and takes advantage of the UHS-I bus to support DSLR functions such Full HD video, as well as raw and JPEG captures.

features.Key Features: 64GB & 128GB Storage Capacity | UHS-I / U1 / Class 10 | Max Read Speed: 140 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 10 MB/s | Records Full HD Video | Capture Raw and JPEG Photos | Water / Shock / X-Ray Proof | Can Resist Temperature Extremes | Built-In Write-Protect Switch
features.What’s In The Box: SanDisk Ultra UHS-I SDXC Memory Card
